name: Automated Proposal Follow-Up & Deal Stage Updater

parameters.content:
##  Automated Proposal Follow-Up & Deal Stage Updater
This workflow automatically monitors deals where a proposal has been sent and takes action when prospects go silent. It enriches contact data, checks suppression lists, applies deal-value triage, caps follow-up attempts, sends personalised emails, updates HubSpot, logs every action, and alerts the sales team — all fully automated and production-safe.

### How it works

	•	Runs every weekday morning at 9am.
	•	Fetches Proposal-stage deals from HubSpot with no activity in 3+ days.
	•	Enriches each deal with the prospect's real email from their HubSpot contact.
	•	Checks a suppression list and a follow-up counter before sending anything.
	•	Routes high-value vs standard deals to different email templates.
	•	Sends the right follow-up email via Gmail and updates the deal stage.
	•	Logs every action to Google Sheets and notifies the sales team in Slack.
	•	Catches any errors and sends a dedicated failure alert to Slack.

### Setup Steps

	1.	Connect your HubSpot account.
	2.	Connect your Gmail account.
	3.	Connect your Slack workspace and update both channel names.
	4.	Connect Google Sheets and paste your tracking sheet ID in the Log nodes.
	5.	Turn on the workflow.

## Step 1: Find Stale Proposals
This step runs every morning and pulls all open deals from HubSpot that are in the Proposal Sent stage. It then filters down to only the deals where no activity has happened in the last 3 days — these are the prospects who need a nudge.

## Step 2: Enrich & Safety Check
Before sending anything, this step fetches the prospect's real email from HubSpot, checks they haven't asked to opt out, and checks how many times we've already followed up. If they're on the suppression list or we've already sent 3 follow-ups, we skip them entirely.

## Step 3: Send & Update
This step routes the deal to the right email template based on deal value, sends the follow-up email from Gmail, and then updates the deal stage in HubSpot. High-value deals get a more personalised message to maximise the chance of a response.

## Step 4: Log & Notify
Once the follow-up is sent, this step appends a full record to Google Sheets and sends a Slack notification to the sales team. The sheet tracks every follow-up attempt so the team has full visibility and can spot deals that need manual intervention.

## Step 5: Error Handling
If anything goes wrong at any point — a failed API call, a missing contact, a Gmail error — this section catches it and immediately sends a Slack alert to the ops channel with details of what failed and which deal was affected. No silent failures.

parameters.message:
Hi {{ $json.prospectFirstName }},

I wanted to reach out personally about the proposal we shared for {{ $json.dealName }}.

Given the scale of what we're looking to do together, I'd love to jump on a 20-minute call to walk you through any questions — or tailor the proposal if anything has changed on your end.

I've kept some time open this week. Would any of the following work for you?
- Tuesday 10am
- Wednesday 2pm
- Thursday 11am

Looking forward to speaking soon.

Warm regards,
The Sales Team
parameters.subject: A quick personal note about our proposal — {{ $json.dealName }}

parameters.message:
Hi {{ $json.prospectFirstName }},

I wanted to follow up on the proposal we sent over for {{ $json.dealName }}.

We understand you may be evaluating options, and we'd love to answer any questions or clarify anything in the proposal.

Would you be open to a quick 15-minute call this week?

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
The Sales Team
parameters.subject: Following up on our proposal — {{ $json.dealName }}
